title: Welcome to Moldy Manor
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Trap tricks Geronimo into spending everything, so Grandfather sends him to stingy Uncle Samuel's Moldy Manor to learn about saving! 🏚️

q.en: Why did Geronimo's bank account go down to zero dollars?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的银行账户为什么变成了零元？

options.en: Trap tricked him into buying lots of presents using his money and cards
options.zh: 特拉普骗他用自己钱和卡买了一大堆礼物

options.en: He donated it all to charity
options.zh: 他把钱全都捐给了慈善机构

options.en: A thief broke into his safe
options.zh: 有小偷闯进他的保险箱

explain.en: On his birthday, Trap pretended it was also Trap's birthday and made Geronimo pay for mountains of presents with his cash, checks, and credit cards.
explain.zh: 生日那天，特拉普谎称那天也是自己的生日，逼杰罗尼摩用现金、支票和信用卡给自己买了一大堆礼物。

q.en: Who is Geronimo's grandfather, also known as 'Cheap Mouse Willy'?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的祖父是谁？他外号叫“小气鼠威利”。

explain.en: Grandfather William Shortpaws, nicknamed Cheap Mouse Willy, scolds Geronimo and sends him to learn about saving.
explain.zh: 祖父威廉·肖特波外号“小气鼠威利”，他训斥杰罗尼摩，并安排他去学习省钱。

q.en: Where does Uncle Samuel S. Stingysnout live now?
q.zh: 塞缪尔·S·吝啬鼻叔叔现在住在哪里？

options.en: Moldy Manor in the Valley of Thrift

explain.en: The Stingysnout family moved from Penny Pincher Castle to Moldy Manor in the Valley of Thrift.
explain.zh: 吝啬鼻一家从吝啬者城堡搬到了节俭谷里的发霉庄园。

q.en: Who teaches Geronimo the crash course in saving money?
q.zh: 是谁教杰罗尼摩省钱速成课的？

explain.en: Miserly Parsimouse, nicknamed the Wallet Watchrat, is the greatest saving expert in the Valley of Thrift and Geronimo's instructor.
explain.zh: “钱包看守鼠”吝啬·省钱鼠是节俭谷里最厉害的省钱专家，也是杰罗尼摩的老师。

q.en: How did Geronimo travel to Moldy Manor?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩是怎么去发霉庄园的？

options.en: Third-class train, bus, bike with a manure cart, then on paw
options.zh: 三等火车、公交车、自行车加粪车，最后步行

explain.en: Grandfather booked a deep-discount trip: three hours by third-class train, six by bus, thirty miles by bike (then a manure cart), and the last mile on paw.
explain.zh: 祖父订了超便宜的行程：三等火车三小时、公交六小时、自行车三十英里（后来改坐粪车），最后一英里靠步行。

q.en: What did Geronimo give Uncle Samuel to pay for his room at Moldy Manor?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩把什么给了塞缪尔叔叔，用来付发霉庄园的房费？

options.en: His gold watch, a gift from his sister Thea
options.zh: 他妹妹茜拉送的黄金手表

explain.en: Because the room was 'for paying guests only,' Geronimo had to barter his gold watch, a gift from Thea, to stay.
explain.zh: 因为房间写着“只招待付费客人”，杰罗尼摩只好用妹妹茜拉送的黄金手表抵住宿费。

q.en: Who gave Geronimo a red notebook to write down what he earns and spends?
q.zh: 谁给了杰罗尼摩一本红笔记本，让他记下收支？

explain.en: Thea brought Geronimo a red notebook and told him to track every coin he earns and spends — a good habit to control money.
explain.zh: 茜拉给杰罗尼摩一本红笔记本，让他记下每一笔收入和支出，这是控制财务状况的好习惯。

q.en: What was the name of the saving crash course?
q.zh: 那门省钱速成课叫什么名字？

options.en: Become a Saver in Three Simple Stingy Steps
options.zh: 《用三个简单小气步骤成为省钱鼠》

explain.en: Miserly Parsimouse's course was 'Become a Saver in Three Simple Stingy Steps,' with days on the thrifty house, Thrifty City, and a final exam.
explain.zh: 吝啬·省钱鼠的课程叫《用三个简单小气步骤成为省钱鼠》，分节俭之家、节俭城和期末考试三天。

q.en: Why could Geronimo not pass the Misermouse final exam?
q.zh: 为什么杰罗尼摩没通过“小气鼠”期末考试？

options.en: He could not pretend to be stingy because he likes to share with friends
options.zh: 他没法装小气，因为他喜欢和朋友分享

options.en: He fell asleep during the test
The questions were in a foreign language

explain.en: Geronimo admitted he is not and will never be a penny-pincher; he prefers sharing, so he couldn't honestly pass the stingy test.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩承认自己现在和将来都不是小气鬼，他更喜欢分享，所以没法诚实地通过小气测试。

q.en: What did Miserly Parsimouse want as payment for the course?
q.zh: 吝啬·省钱鼠想要什么来抵课程费？

options.en: Geronimo's boots, which were stuck on his paws
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩脚上那双脱不下来的靴子

explain.en: Miserly never gives credit, so he pointed at Geronimo's boots; Geronimo agreed they were Miserly's if he could get them off his paws.
explain.zh: 省钱鼠从不赊账，他指了指杰罗尼摩的靴子；杰罗尼摩说只要你能把它从脚上脱下来，就归你。
